sentences.text: Hi is Misty available. I'm sorry. Yeah that would be great actually. Okay. Okay. Alright, thank you. Hey Missy, it's Alex from rentable. I'm just calling because I am on the zoom link for our schedule chat and wanted to see if I can expect you to hop on or not or if you'd like to reschedule I'm pretty open. This afternoon. So just you know reply to my email or give me a call back eight five six two one four five nine four five um, otherwise, I will um, you know talk to you soon have a good one.
